description_long: This is a wooden fence panel composed of vertical planks, each with a slightly irregular top edge, giving a rustic appearance. The front side features two horizontal support rails, reinforcing the structure and adding visual depth. The back side of the fence is painted green, with visible streaks and weathering, suggesting outdoor exposure and age. The planks are closely spaced, providing privacy and acting as a solid barrier. There are no visible decorative elements, post caps, or gates integrated into the design. The overall construction is simple and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban yards, parks, or as a property boundary.
description: A rustic wooden fence panel with vertical planks, horizontal support rails, and a weathered green-painted back. The design is simple, solid, and utilitarian, ideal for privacy or boundary marking.
description_view_0: Front view showing vertical wooden planks and two horizontal support rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the layered arrangement of planks and rails.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the green-painted, weathered surface of the planks with visible streaks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and construction layers.
